2605.07982.title: GLiGuard: Schema-Conditioned Classification for LLM Safeguard
2605.07982.paper_summary: Ensuring safe, policy-compliant outputs from large language models requires real-time content moderation that can scale across multiple safety dimensions. However, state-of-the-art guardrail models rely on autoregressive decoders with 7B--27B parameters, reformulating what is fundamentally a classification problem as sequential text generation, a design choice that incurs high latency and scales poorly to multi-aspect evaluation. In this work, we introduce \textbf{GLiGuard}, a 0.3B-parameter schema-conditioned bidirectional encoder adapted from GLiNER2 for LLM content moderation. The key idea is to encode task definitions and label semantics directly into the input sequence as structured token schemas, enabling simultaneous evaluation of prompt safety, response safety, refusal detection, 14 fine-grained harm categories, and 11 jailbreak strategies in a single non-autoregressive forward pass. This schema-conditioned design lets supported task and label blocks be composed directly in the input schema at inference time. Across nine established safety benchmarks, GLiGuard achieves F1 scores competitive with 7B--27B decoder-based guards despite being 23--90$\times$ smaller, while delivering up to 16$\times$ higher throughput and 17$\times$ lower latency. These results suggest that compact bidirectional encoders can approach the accuracy of much larger guard models while drastically reducing inference cost. Code and models are available at https://github.com/fastino-ai/GLiGuard.
2605.07982.paper_summary_zh: 確保大型語言模型輸出的安全性和政策合規性需要實時內容監控，並能夠在多個安全維度上擴展。<lb/>然而，最先進的防護模型依賴於具有 7B--27B 參數的自回歸解碼器，將根本上是一個分類問題重新定義為序列文本生成，這一設計選擇導致了高延遲，並且在多方面評估中擴展效果不佳。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了 \textbf{GLiGuard}，這是一個從 GLiNER2 調整而來的 0.3B 參數的模式條件雙向編碼器，用於 LLM 內容監控。<lb/>關鍵思想是將任務定義和標籤語義直接編碼到輸入序列中作為結構化的標記模式，從而在單次非自回歸前向傳遞中實現提示安全性、響應安全性、拒絕檢測、14 個細粒度傷害類別和 11 個越獄策略的同時評估。<lb/>這種模式條件設計使得支持的任務和標籤區塊可以在推理時直接組合到輸入模式中。<lb/>在九個已建立的安全基準中，GLiGuard 的 F1 分數與 7B--27B 解碼器基礎的防護模型相當，儘管其規模小 23--90$\times$，同時提供高達 16$\times$ 的更高吞吐量和 17$\times$ 的更低延遲。<lb/>這些結果表明，緊湊的雙向編碼器可以接近更大防護模型的準確性，同時大幅降低推理成本。<lb/>代碼和模型可在 https://github.com/fastino-ai/GLiGuard 獲得。
2605.07982.author: Urchade Zaratiana et.al.
2605.07982.authors: Urchade Zaratiana, Mary Newhauser, George Hurn-Maloney, Ash Lewis
